description: This source file defines a React component called NoteEditorModal, which provides a modal dialog for creating, editing, and deleting notes within a note-taking application. It manages internal states for note attributes like title, content, tags, and pinned status, and handles user interactions for saving or deleting notes. The component also imports several UI components and utility functions, and includes a helper function for parsing tags.

methods.name: parseTags
methods.description: Utility function to parse a comma-separated string into a deduplicated array of tags, trimming whitespace and preserving order.

methods.name: NoteEditorModal
methods.description: React functional component that renders a modal for creating or editing a note. Handles form state, user interactions, and API callbacks for note operations.
